text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Argh! What an unexpected twist of<n>fate...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it wasn't your fault, Trainer!<n>Don't worry
about it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But still, how could this have<n>happened?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I must seek the truth from Shiraoki!<n>Woiya, haiya!
